mapper.insert: INSERT IGNORE INTO user_follow (user_id, follow_user_id, create_time) VALUES (#{userId}, #{followUserId}, NOW())
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM user_follow WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND follow_user_id = #{followUserId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM user_follow WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND follow_user_id = #{followUserId}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM user_follow WHERE follow_user_id = #{userId}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM user_follow WHERE user_id = #{userId}
